Home / Services / Custom Cabinetry

Custom Cabinetry

Elevate your home with handcrafted, bespoke cabinetry.

Transform your kitchen, bathroom, or any room with custom-designed and built cabinetry. We work closely with you to understand your specific needs and style preferences, creating truly unique and functional storage solutions. From classic designs to modern aesthetics, we handle every detail, from material selection to precise installation. We understand the nuances of Seattle homes, ensuring cabinets are perfectly fitted and built to withstand the damp climate. Maximize space, improve organization, and add lasting value to your home with our custom cabinetry services.

We source premium hardwoods and utilize proven construction techniques to guarantee durability and beauty. Our commitment to quality extends beyond the finished product, ensuring a smooth and seamless installation process.

Imagine handcrafted cabinets perfectly tailored to your Seattle craftsman, or sleek modern storage for your Bellevue condo. We specialize in bringing your vision to life with exceptional craftsmanship.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation & Design – We discuss your needs, style, and budget to create a detailed design plan.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – Choose from a wide range of premium hardwoods and finishes.
  3. 03 Step 3: Fabrication – Our skilled craftsmen build your cabinets with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation – We ensure a seamless and professional installation, minimizing disruption to your home.

Benefits

  • Maximize storage space
  • Enhance home aesthetics
  • Increase property value
  • Create personalized solutions

Frequently Asked Questions

What materials do you use for custom cabinetry?

We use a variety of premium hardwoods, including maple, oak, cherry, and walnut, as well as high-quality plywood and veneers. We source our materials from sustainable suppliers.

How long does it take to complete a custom cabinetry project?

The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. Typically, it takes between 4 to 8 weeks from design to installation.

Do you offer design services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive design services to help you create the perfect cabinetry for your home. Our experienced designers will work with you to develop a detailed plan that meets your needs and style preferences.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with custom cabinetry? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +12068838797
